_comment: Latest auto-bounty completed by the live VPS swarm. Updated by /opt/scholar-swarm/scripts/vps-cron-bounty.sh every 6 hours; the post-run hook in that script also commits this file and pushes via the deploy key. Frontend reads via raw.githubusercontent.com.

previousRuns.trigger: manual · validation run before enabling cron

deploymentNote: 5 AXL nodes + 5 agent runtimes managed by systemd, restart=always. SearXNG on the same host serves retrieval. Cron triggers a fresh bounty every 6 hours. The vps-cron-bounty.sh wrapper writes a per-run log to /var/log/scholar-cron/, updates this file in /opt/scholar-swarm/docs/vps-runs/, then commits and pushes via the deploy key.
